lines.text: You hustlin', grindin', you hustlin', you grindin'
Let this world go on today
No need for fake games, they go on
When I throw bombs with a microphone, doing tornadoes
Can you hear me?
You too go on
Let this world go on today
No need for fake games, they go on
When I throw bombs with a microphone, doing tornadoes
Can you hear me?
You too go on
I don't need respect, I don't need connect
In front of me is an open,
huge continent
We smoke all day,
we smoke everywhere
Rappers will not stop
fucking Everything they write about,
they see only in dreams
These faggots have been stuck in the nest
for a long time Clerks carry their soul to
work Let this fucking world go on,
because it is built on money Most
don't give a fuck about themselves
Those bastards who teach, say how we can't do
Someone's mother is now crying
Her son went in search of another dose
And it's too late to change something
Every little one wants to become an adult faster
I grew up and every morning I say thank God
for the air All I need is my health and family
I don't look at others when I do myself
I know for sure that we will all die as a gift
But no one will take my everything
All I have, brother, is love
I want to give it only to those who are scum
I'm the only one here against the whole world
I don't talk to strangers, but I just pass by calmly
This world is going on today
Don't lie, they are going on
When I throw bombs with a microphone
Making a tornado, you hear me
You are also going on
This world is going on today
Don't lie, they are going on
When I throw bombs with a microphone
Making a tornado, you hear me
You are also going on
You are also going on
You are also going on
